channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Vegetation is growing and is obscuring view of traffic on pirton lane when emerging from yew tree way, 23rd May
item.description:
Mrs Webb Oakhurst Close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58,60,62, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain opposite 162 Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, within Tewkesbury Borough Council area, 23rd May
item.description:
It fills with drain water after rain but never empties. Often water goes away but comes back from inside the drain so it must be blocked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long pothole dent in road mid roundabout, 23rd May
item.description:
It's a long pothole in the middle of the road on a 3 lane roundabout which causes people to veer left or right to avoid it, therefore encroaching on the space of drivers in neighbouring lanes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: College Drive - kerb is damaged, 23rd May
item.description:
College Drive at turn off into square

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, College Drive, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham

item.title: This 20 ton RORO skip outside number 40 does not have any lights, 23rd May
item.description:
40 Oldbury orchard Churchdown Gloucestershire GL32PU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldbury Orchard, Churchdown, Tewkesbury

item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 23rd May
item.description:
Pothole in carriageway - Has got larger since last night - No exact dimensions mentioned, No mentioned vehicle damage -Police ref 245
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 23rd May
item.description:
Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Opposite old Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to dog waste bin: 0273 What3words: ///lunge.laminate.fittingly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester

item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: 2 x sections of road not repaired, 23rd May
item.description:
Outside 163 Hewlett Contractors were on site this week to repair a number of potholes, they have left two sections not repaired. Why wasn't the job completed properly on the latest visit?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Teme Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Fly tipping over motorway railings from flyover. Rubbish is between footpath and M5 motorway, 23rd May
item.description:
Some of the rubbish has been there for ages
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury

item.title: Long pothole measuring 10m+ in length where surface course has come away, particularly dangerous for people crossing the road and cyclists, 23rd May
item.description:
Stretches whole length in front of my coffee and bath roadcoop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188;192;194, Bath Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous temporary traffic lights, 23rd May
item.description:
Cars unable to stop at end of Sandycroft as blocks cycle path and also too close to main road as back end of car is blocking main road and cycle path if more than one car has stopped ridiculously positioned and cyclists are being aggressive as cars now blocking the cycle lane turning into Sandycroft
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Sandycroft Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light head is facing wrong direction

item.title: Bin bag dumped next to mural on London Road/Keynsham Bank, 23rd May
item.description:
Black bin bag dumped next to Dali mural on the green space between London Road and Keynsham Bank (next to/behind Kebaburger)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging highway and pavement, 23rd May
item.description:
Trees are overhanging highway, drivers need to move into far side of road to avoid as they are low and obscure vision. Also impossible to walk on the path as the trees are overhang

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road
